calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-26-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF L.A. COMMERCIAL GROUP, INC.'S DBA MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. GRANT-NO OPPOSITION FILED.(302/REQ/JU) BELDON YEE #2647

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-03-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-26-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ann Mendoza.
Scott Gursky, Esq. for Plaintiff: L.A. Commercial Group, Inc., a corporation, dba Continental Commercial Group.
Plaintiff's witness: Jeff Krouse, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants: William Anthony Nugent, ind & dba Golden Gate Utilities; Joseph Anthony McMenamin, ind. & dba GoldenGate Utilities as follows:
Damages $31,807.57
Prejudgment Interest $4,121.50
Attorney's Fees $660.00
Costs $352.50 for a total of $37,004.57
Judgment signed in open court.
